name: Xiaohongshu Research Kit
tagline: Extract metadata, images, and stats from Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) notes
description: A content research toolkit for Xiaohongshu (小红书 / Little Red Book / RED). Extract note text, images, engagement stats, user profiles, and topic content — powered by yt-dlp and gallery-dl locally. Supports both image notes and video notes. Perfect for Chinese social media research and content analysis.
